name: Curry and Grape Chicken Salad Lettuce Cups

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

ingredients.item: boneless, skinless chicken breast, cut into ¼-inch

method: In a medium skillet or saucepan, combine the chicken and enough water to
come halfway up the chicken. Bring to a low simmer over medium-high
heat, cover, and cook the chicken for 10 to 15 minutes, until the juices run
clear. Drain the poaching liquid and place the chicken in the refrigerator to
In a medium bowl, mix together the cooled chicken, mayonnaise, sour
cream, grapes, almonds, curry powder, salt, and white pepper until well
Set 3 lettuce leaves each on two plates. Evenly divide the chicken salad
among the lettuce leaves, taco style, and serve.
This recipe was the winner of a cook-off. These are great to enjoy on warm
